data.name: SqlSelectCommand1.CommandText
data.value: SELECT cod_prv, CASE WHEN ISNULL(razon_social, '') = '' THEN ISNULL(nombre, '') ELSE ISNULL(razon_social, '') END AS razon_social, rfc, telefono, celular, status, calle, nombre, ISNULL(usuario, '') AS usuario, ISNULL(banco, '') AS banco, ISNULL(cuenta, '') AS cuenta, ISNULL(vendedor, '') AS vendedor, ISNULL(telefonoVendedor, '') AS telefonoVendedor, usuario AS Expr1, banco AS Expr2, cuenta AS Expr3, vendedor AS Expr4, telefonoVendedor AS Expr5 FROM proveedores WITH (NOLOCK)
